evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Payment plans (monthly for 3-month program)', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm the existence of a payment plan mechanism. While the linked use case mentions that Sarah pays in 3 monthly installments, there is no concrete evidence of an API endpoint or functionality that supports the management of such payment plans. This leads to a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary details to confirm the functionality are missing.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms for managing payment plans.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
